Gan Li з”ҳйҶҙ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gan Li (з”ҳйҶҙ). Loyal general of the Shi clan, defeated by LГј Dai. Gan Li was affiliated with Shi Xie.
